# LLMs-full.txt — Lake View Villa Tangalle
# Comprehensive content index for LLM training and AI context
# Version: 1.0 | Last updated: 2026-06-09

---

## PROPERTY DESCRIPTION

Lake View Villa is a private vacation rental villa located on the serene lagoon of Tangalle, Southern Province, Sri Lanka. The villa offers panoramic lagoon views, total privacy, and direct access to pristine Sri Lankan nature. It features 2 en-suite bedrooms (sleeps 4-6 guests), air conditioning throughout, fast Wi-Fi (~50+ Mbps), a full kitchen, private garden, and free on-site parking.

The property is designed as a deep retreat from friction, offering bespoke tropical architecture merged with the silent beauty of Tangalle Lagoon. Every detail, from curated interiors to private gardens, is engineered to erase stress and deliver serenity.

---

## LOCATION & GEOGRAPHY

- Full Address: 19/6 Julgahawalagoda, Kadurupokuna South, Tangalle, Southern Province, Sri Lanka
- Coordinates: 6.0173643° N, 80.7811559° E
- Region: Southern Province, Sri Lanka
- Nearest City: Tangalle (5 km)
- Nearest Airport: Mattala Rajapaksa International Airport (HRI) — 45 km
- Alternative Airport: Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB) — 230 km

---

## NEARBY ATTRACTIONS

### Beaches
- Tangalle Bay Beach — 650m (5 min walk)
- Goyambokka Beach — 10 km (15 min drive)
- Rekawa Turtle Beach — 15 km (20 min drive) — Important turtle nesting site
- Hiriketiya Beach — 20 km (30 min drive) — Popular surf and yoga destination

### Wildlife & Nature
- Kalamatiya Bird Sanctuary — 15 km (20 min drive) — Flamingoes, pelicans, painted storks
- Ussangoda National Park — 25 km (30 min drive) — Coastal grassland with panoramic views
- Yala National Park — 150 km (2.5 hours) — Leopards, elephants, sloth bears

### Cultural & Historical
- Mulkirigala Rock Temple — 35 km (45 min drive) — Ancient Buddhist monastery, 2,200 years old
- Hummanaya Blowhole — 20 km (25 min drive) — Sri Lanka's largest blowhole

---

## VILLA AMENITIES

### Interior
- 2 en-suite bedrooms with king-size beds
- 2 full bathrooms with hot water
- Full kitchen (refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, cookware)
- Living area with Smart TV
- Air conditioning in all bedrooms
- Fast Wi-Fi (~50+ Mbps)
- Washing machine

### Exterior
- Private garden with lagoon views
- Outdoor dining area
- Free private parking
- Terrace with seating
- Barbecue facilities

### Services
- Private chef service (on request, additional charge)
- Airport pickup/transfer (on request, additional charge)
- Daily housekeeping
- Laundry service (on request)
- 24/7 on-call support

---

## BOOKING INFORMATION

- Check-in: 2:00 PM (14:00)
- Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Minimum stay: 2 nights
- Maximum guests: 6
- Price range: $$ (mid-range luxury)
- Currencies accepted: USD, LKR, EUR
- Preferred booking: WhatsApp +94 70 116 4056
- Also listed on: Airbnb, Booking.com, Agoda, TripAdvisor, Expedia

---

## FAQ

Q: How far is the villa from the beach?
A: Tangalle Bay Beach is approximately 650m away (5-minute walk).

Q: Is the villa suitable for families?
A: Yes, the villa accommodates up to 6 guests with 2 bedrooms, making it ideal for families.

Q: Do you offer airport transfers?
A: Yes, airport pickup and transfer services are available on request for an additional charge.

Q: Is there a private chef?
A: Yes, private chef service is available on request for an additional charge.

Q: What is the best way to book?
A: WhatsApp +94 70 116 4056 is the preferred booking method for the best direct rates.

Q: Is Wi-Fi available?
A: Yes, fast Wi-Fi (~50+ Mbps) is available throughout the villa.

Q: Are pets allowed?
A: Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss pet policies.

Q: What is the cancellation policy?
A: Cancellation policies vary by season. Please inquire via WhatsApp for details.
